productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's White Daisy Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton white Minnie polka dot dressWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs..Fitting:Comfort FitThis white dress with red polka dots and a happy Minnie from disney is a must for your little girl's wardrobe. Team this with her favourite shoes when on a summer picnic.
